inputs.description: Sauna name (must match SaunaName in csvs/sauna_info.csv). Use ALL (or leave blank) to scrape everything.
Booking page URL to generate a scraper for
Sauna name (leave blank to auto-detect from page)
Seats per session (leave blank to auto-detect from page)

tasks.label: Sauna: setup (install deps + Playwright Chromium)
args: set -euo pipefail; if ! command -v gh >/dev/null 2>&1; then if command -v brew >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Installing GitHub CLI (gh) via Homebrew..."; brew install gh; else echo "Error: GitHub CLI (gh) is not installed and Homebrew (brew) was not found."; echo "Install gh: https://cli.github.com/"; exit 1; fi; fi; ${workspaceFolder}/.vscode/loadNodeVersion npm install && ${workspaceFolder}/.vscode/loadNodeVersion npx playwright install chromium

tasks.label: Sauna: scrape booking data (prompt for sauna)
args: SAUNA="${input:saunaName}"; if [[ -z "$SAUNA" || "$SAUNA" == "ALL" ]]; then ${workspaceFolder}/.vscode/loadNodeVersion npm run scrape:booking-data; else ${workspaceFolder}/.vscode/loadNodeVersion npm run scrape:booking-data -- --sauna "$SAUNA"; fi

tasks.label: Sauna: generate opening times weekly (3-week heuristic)
Sauna: update (sync csvs + scrape booking data + push bookings to database)
Sauna: generate scraper from URL
args: set -euo pipefail; URL="${input:generatorUrl}"; NAME="${input:generatorName}"; SEATS="${input:generatorSeats}"; CMD="${workspaceFolder}/.vscode/loadNodeVersion npm run generate:scraper -- \"$URL\""; if [[ -n "$NAME" ]]; then CMD="$CMD --name=\"$NAME\""; fi; if [[ -n "$SEATS" && "$SEATS" != "0" ]]; then CMD="$CMD --seats=\"$SEATS\""; fi; eval "$CMD"

tasks.label: Sauna: pull database from origin/data
args: set -euo pipefail; git fetch origin data; git checkout origin/data -- sauna_bookings.sqlite
